events.name: FC Cologne at 1. FC Union Berlin

headlines.description: Patrik Schick celebrated his first Bundesliga start of the season Wednesday with a hat trick as Bayer Leverkusen consolidated top spot in the Bundesliga and set a record for games unbeaten with a 4-0 rout of VfL Bochum.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leverkusen set German record for unbeaten start

video.headline: Patrik Schick's hat trick powers Leverkusen to win

tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC Highlight (Patrik Schick’s hat trick powers Leverkusen to win) 2023/12/20 ESHEET SOTFULL

headlines.description: Bayern Munich were made to work hard for a 2-1 victory at VfL Wolfsburg on Wednesday with Bundesliga top scorer Harry Kane on target to go into the winter break in second place, four points off the top and with a game in hand.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kane scores again as Bayern edge Wolfsburg

video.headline: Musiala, Kane's goals power Bayern to win over Wolfsburg

tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC Highlight (Musiala, Kane’s goals power Bayern to win over Wolfsburg) 2023/12/20 ESHEET SOTFULL
